prompt:
Replace ONLY the right-aligned secondary text next to the "Wi-Fi" row in this iOS Settings screen. The current text reads "MyHome-5G". Change it to read exactly "MyHome" (no suffix, no hyphen). The chevron arrow at the far right of that row remains unchanged.

Preserve absolutely everything else exactly as in the reference, including: the iPhone 15 Pro device frame, tall portrait aspect ratio, titanium bezel, dynamic island, drop shadow, soft light-gray background, all margins; the status bar showing "9:41" with signal/wifi/battery icons; the bold "設定" navigation title; the first grouped section rows "機内モード" (with OFF toggle), "Wi-Fi" label itself, "Bluetooth" with "オン" and chevron, "モバイル通信" with chevron; the second grouped section rows "通知" (orange bell), "サウンドと触覚" (pink speaker), "おやすみモード" (purple moon), "スクリーンタイム" (indigo hourglass) with their colored icon tiles; all separators, all paddings, all typography (font, weight, size, color).

Do NOT change anything except MyHome-5G → MyHome text swap.

Constraints: no watermark, no extra text, no logos, no layout shifts, no color shifts.
